data.content: Implemented registry-consistency fixable diagnostic: added updateRegisteredRepoMemoryManagerType to registry.ts, marked mismatch diagnostic fixable:true with sync fix option, added registry-consistency case in applyFix with isKnownMemoryManagerType validation, added comprehensive tests in doctor-applyfix.test.ts and doctor.test.ts. All 120 test files pass (1908 tests), typecheck clean, build succeeds.
